commands.review_summary:
The branch converts stacked doctor repair buckets, including session lock and transcript cleanup, into structured health checks with dry-run/effect metadata, detect-after validation, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for this PR review: there is no standalone current-main bug report to reproduce. Source inspection confirms the latest head now scopes the session repair mutations to passed finding paths, and I did not run tests because this review is read-only.

target.title: Doctor: structure session repair checks
target.body:
## Summary

- Stack continuation after #83753, #84290, #84326, and #84340; this PR intentionally includes the earlier doctor repair stack while the GitHub base remains `main`.
- Moves stale session lock cleanup into the structured doctor repair flow with concrete dry-run and real repair effects.
- Moves broken session transcript active-branch cleanup into the structured doctor repair flow with detect-after validation.
- Preserves existing top-level `openclaw doctor` read-only diagnostics outside fix mode, while `doctor --fix` now uses the structured repair/detect-after path.

## Effect Catalog

- `would-remove-stale-session-lock`: dry-run stale lock removal preview, targets the lock file path, `dryRunSafe: false`.
- `remove-stale-session-lock`: real stale lock removal, targets the removed lock file path.
- `would-rewrite-session-transcript-active-branch`: dry-run transcript active-branch rewrite preview, targets the transcript path, `dryRunSafe: true`.
- `rewrite-session-transcript-active-branch`: real transcript active-branch rewrite, targets the repaired transcript path.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-session-locks.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 5 files / 74 tests passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-session-locks.ts src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts` - passed.
- `git diff --check` - passed.
- `node node_modules/@typescript/native-preview/bin/tsgo.js --noEmit --pretty false -p tsconfig.json` - passed.
- Local autoreview - clean after restoring non-fix session diagnostics.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw doctor --fix` can now repair stale session lock files and broken session transcript active branches through structured doctor checks with concrete effects, dry-run previews, and detect-after validation.

Real environment tested: WSL source checkout in the OpenClaw doctor stack worktree, using temp `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` fixtures for real filesystem lock/transcript repair behavior.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-session-locks.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot`.

Evidence after fix: focused structured repair tests assert stale lock deletion, transcript rewrite, dry-run no-op behavior, emitted effect action/target data, `checksRepaired`, `checksValidated`, and no remaining findings after real repair.

Observed result after fix: stale session locks are removed in real repair mode and remain in dry-run mode; broken session transcripts are rewritten in real repair mode and remain unchanged in dry-run mode; detect-after confirms both repaired categories are no longer reported.

What was not tested: full changed gate, Crabbox/Testbox cross-platform proof, and the larger deferred state-integrity / Codex session-route buckets.
